prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large purple metal cube
  - obj_1: small purple rubber cube
  - obj_2: small red metal cylinder
  - obj_3: small blue metal sphere
  - obj_4: large yellow rubber sphere
  - obj_5: large purple metal cube
  - obj_6: large green rubber cube
  - obj_7: small yellow rubber cube

Questions:
[qrr_0161] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0162] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0163] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0164] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0165] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0166] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0167] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0168] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0169] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0170] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0171] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0172] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0173] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0174] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0175] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0176] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0177] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0178] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0179] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0180] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of objects in the scene and answer distance comparison questions.

Let me estimate the positions of each object:
- obj_0 (large purple metal cube): right side, behind/above, approximately (3, 0.5, -1)
- obj_1 (small purple rubber cube): front-center area, approximately (1, 0.3, 1)
- obj_2 (small red metal cylinder): far back, approximately (1, 0.5, -3)
- obj_3 (small blue metal sphere): center, approximately (2, 0.3, 0.5)
- obj_4 (large yellow rubber sphere): left-back, approximately (-1, 0.5, -1)
- obj_5 (large purple metal cube): front-right, approximately (2.5, 0.3, 0.5)
- obj_6 (large green rubber cube): far front-left, approximately (-0.5, 0.3, 2)
- obj_7 (small yellow rubber cube): right side, approximately (3.5, 0.3, 0)

Now let me calculate approximate distances:

obj_2-obj_3: sqrt((2-1)²+(0.3-0.5)²+(0.5-(-3))²) ≈ sqrt(1+0.04+12.25) ≈ 3.6
obj_5-obj_7: sqrt((3.5-2.5)²+(0.3-0.3)²+(0-0.5)²) ≈ sqrt(1+0+0.25) ≈ 1.1
obj_6-obj_7: sqrt((3.5-(-0.5))²+(0.3-0.3)²+(0-2)²) ≈ sqrt(16+0+4) ≈ 4.5
obj_2-obj_4: sqrt((-1-1)²+(0.5-0.5)²+(-1-(-3))²) ≈ sqrt(4+0+4) ≈ 2.8
obj_3-obj_5: sqrt((2.5-2)²+(0.3-0.3)²+(0.5-0.5)²) ≈ 0.5
obj_3-obj_6: sqrt((-0.5-2)²+(0.3-0.3)²+(2-0.5)²) ≈ sqrt(6.25+0+2.25) ≈ 2.9
obj_3-obj_7: sqrt((3.5-2)²+(0.3-0.3)²+(0-0.5)²) ≈ sqrt(2.25+0+0.25) ≈ 1.6
obj_5-obj_6: sqrt((-0.5-2.5)²+(0.3-0.3)²+(2-0.5)²) ≈ sqrt(9+0+2.25) ≈ 3.4
obj_2-obj_5: sqrt((2.5-1)²+(0.3-0.5)²+(0.5-(-3))²) ≈ sqrt(2.25+0.04+12.25) ≈ 3.8
obj_3-obj_4: sqrt((-1-2)²+(0.5-0.3)²+(-1-0.5)²) ≈ sqrt(9+0.04+2.25) ≈ 3.4
obj_4-obj_6: sqrt((-0.5-(-1))²+(0.3-0.5)²+(2-(-1))²) ≈ sqrt(0.25+0.04+9) ≈ 3.0
obj_4-obj_7: sqrt((3.5-(-1))²+(0.3-0.5)²+(0-(-1))²) ≈ sqrt(20.25+0.04+1) ≈ 4.6
obj_2-obj_6: sqrt((-0.5-1)²+(0.3-0.5)²+(2-(-3))²) ≈ sqrt(2.25+0.04+25) ≈ 5.3
obj_4-obj_5: sqrt((2.5-(-1))²+(0.3-0.5)²+(0.5-(-1))²) ≈ sqrt(12.25+0.04+2.25) ≈ 3.8
